所有程序包的分层结构

程序包分层结构:
  • application,
  • auth,
  • common,
  • job,
  • module,
  • position,
  • user

类分层结构

  • java.lang.Object
    • application.ApplicationService
    • auth.AuthService
    • common.FileUtil
    • job.JobService
    • Main
    • module.ModuleService
    • position.PositionService
    • TestProfile
    • user.UploadCV
    • user.UserService
